**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-67/codex-25487681396`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/163

Implemented review cleanup for inline PR review comments: the review workflow records synthesis start time, the shared minimizer now queries review threads and collapses older same-agent inline comments while leaving current-run comments visible, and docs/tests were updated. Verification: `npm run build`; `node --test dist/__tests__/review-summary-minimize.test.js dist/__tests__/envelope.test.js dist/__tests__/post-comment-cli.test.js`.

title: After a new review, it should also collapse the previous in-line review comments?
